content: We can reframe state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory as an intrinsically curiosity-driven ICM-modulated hierarchical memory bank, where only high-prediction-error (unexpected, information-dense) experiences are promoted from short-term transient storage to long-term persistent memory, rather than retaining all observed data. This creates an autonomous self-organizing memory system that matches an agent's intrinsic curiosity drive to its active learning sample prioritization.
